data.title: Michael Saylor Predicts Bitcoin to Reach $13 Million in 20 Years
data.description:
Michael Saylor forecasts Bitcoin's price to hit $13 million by 2045, citing its scarcity and unique value.
source: https://coincu.com/327930-michael-saylor-bitcoin-13-million

data.title: Hong Kong Police Uncover Major Fraud and Money Laundering Operation
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong police conducted a significant operation named 'Sovereign' from March 10 to 19 in the Yau Tsim District, targeting fraud and money laundering activities. The operation led to the resolution of 45 cases and the arrest of 54 individuals, with total losses amounting to HKD 194 million. The most significant case involved an online investment scam in virtual currency, resulting in a loss of HKD 72 million. The victim, a foreign national, was deceived into investing in virtual currency and transferring funds to a designated bank account. Following investigations, police arrested two suspects, aged 30 and 34.

data.title: BTC volatility index falls below 50, and the market is expected to enter a period of volatility
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lin Chen, head of Asia-Pacific business at Deribit, said that the BTC volatility index DVOL has fallen below 50 and is currently at 47. In the past year, DVOL was above this value 96% of the time, with a historical high of 92 and a low of 41. Lin Chen pointed out that the sharp drop in volatility means that the market expects BTC to not rise or fall sharply in the short term, and may enter a period of sideways consolidation.

data.title: Twitter's Iconic Bluebird Sign Auctioned for $35,000
data.description: According to PANews, the iconic bluebird sign that once adorned Twitter's San Francisco headquarters has been sold at auction for approximately $35,000. The sale was reported by Boston's RR Auction House. The sign was removed following Elon Musk's acquisition of the social media platform and its subsequent rebranding to 'X.' As a central element of Twitter's brand identity since its inception, the bluebird logo has garnered significant interest in the tech collectibles market.

data.title: Grayscale Reports Significant GBTC Outflow Amid Stable Mini BTC and ETH Flows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates that Grayscale experienced a net outflow of $21.9 million from its GBTC product. Meanwhile, there were no net inflows or outflows for mini BTC and ETHE. However, mini ETH saw a net inflow of $6.7 million.

data.title: USDC Circulation Increases by 1 Billion in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.6 billion USDC and redeemed around 2.6 billion USDC in the week ending March 20, 2025. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 1 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 59.2 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $59.5 billion. Of these reserves, around $7.2 billion is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately $52.3 billion.

data.title: Swiss National Bank Launches Pilot Wholesale CBDC for Tokenized Securities
data.description:
According to PANews, the Swiss National Bank (SNB) has initiated a pilot program for its wholesale central bank digital currency (wCBDC) to facilitate the settlement of tokenized securities on the SIX Digital Exchange (SDX). The SNB's recent annual report highlights this initiative along with other related activities, including the exploration of a synthetic CBDC, a private tokenized currency backed by central bank funds.

The SNB describes this tokenized private currency as one of three options under consideration for distributed ledger technology (DLT) settlement. The other options include the wCBDC and a connection between the SIC payment system and DLT systems, which was previously tested in the Project Helvetia CBDC exploration.

The Swiss central bank emphasized that it has not committed to issuing a permanent wCBDC and remains neutral regarding the adoption of any specific solution, focusing instead on evaluating various options at this stage.

data.title: Ripple calls on SEC to ditch enforcement-first approach after key legal victory
data.description:
Crypto exchange Ripple asks the SEC to focus on setting clear regulatory guidance for crypto companies and abandon past enforcement strategies.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-urges-sec-to-rethink-strategy/

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bithumb will list Across Protocol (ACX) Korean Won trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb will launch the Across Protocol (ACX) Korean won trading pair, which is expected to open for trading at 5 pm on March 22.
